name: agentic-loop
description: Orchestrated multi-model agentic loop: Opus orchestrator, tiered native subagents, bash-shim workers for Sol/Fable/OpenRouter/Ollama, bounded cross-family adversarial review — plus the factory (morning ideas to evening PRs via spec/build/review skills), opt-in observability with run-tree reports, feature flags, and a built-in eval harness.
